summary: This package specifies "The Furnace of Language" — a Murano OS room for turning instinctive high-level literary taste into a reusable, testable, traceable system.
final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Room template v1, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.

Immediate implementation order (from README).
